title: asclepias flexuosa
intro: Asclepias flexuosa, also known as the flexible milkweed or orange milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Asclepias flexuosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Asclepias flexuosa can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or cream for topical application, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
